title: Zephyranthes sylvatica
taxonomy: Zephyranthes sylvatica is classified as a species within the family Amaryllidaceae, a group of flowering plants commonly known as the amaryllis family. It belongs to the genus Zephyranthes, a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as the zephyr lilies. The family Amaryllidaceae is part of the larger order Asparagales, which includes various types of flowering plants. Zephyranthes sylvatica is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a perennial plant that grows from underground bulbs, a characteristic shared by many other species within the Amaryllidaceae family.
